title: Experienced Powers
description: Gives you the ability to turn experience into magic. (DISCONTINUED)
body:
> This data pack is now discontinued. > This means that it will no longer receive any more updates. This data pack gives another use for experience, Magical powers! You can use this experience points to trade for magical powers (well, effects in other words). For example, You can use 10 experience levels to get fire resistance for 30 seconds, or 7 experience levels to heal yourself. Yeah I know, it can be a bit overpowered. To use this data pack, simply use this Command: `/trigger `
Here is a full list of all "powers" and "power_id": | Name | Id | Description | XP level required | XP cost |----------------|---------------|---------------------------------------|------|-----| | Fire resistance | xpower.fire_resistance | Gives 30 seconds of fire resistance. | 25 | 12 | Fire resistance+ | xpower.fire_resistance+ | Gives 2 minutes of fire resistance. | 30 | 18 | Fire resistance++ | xpower.fire_resistance++ | Gives 10 minutes of fire resistance. | 40 | 25 | Slow falling | xpower.slow_falling | Gives 30 seconds of slow falling. | 15 | 5 | Water Breathing | xpower.water_breathing | Gives 1 minutes of water breathing. | 15 | 8 | Water Breathing+ | xpower.water_breathing+ | Gives 5 minutes of water breathing. | 20 | 15 | Water Breathing++ | xpower.water_breathing++ | Gives 20 minutes of water breathing. | 25 | 25 | Heal | xpower.heal | Gives 4 seconds of regeneration V, enough to fill your health bar. | 15 | 5 | Strength+ | xpower.strength+ | Gives 5 minutes of strength I. | 30 | 10 | Strength++ | xpower.strength++ | Gives 10 minutes of strength I. | 35 | 15 | Haste | xpower.haste | Gives 30 seconds of haste I. | 20 | 10 | Haste+ | xpower.haste+ | Gives 2 minutes of haste I. | 30 | 20 | Haste++ | xpower.haste++ | Gives 10 minutes of haste I. | 40 | 25 | Night vision | xpower.night_vision | Gives 2 minutes of night vision | 15 | 4
